scripts.bench:grouped-write: sh -c 'suffix=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_ARTIFACT_SUFFIX:-}; readerProfile=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_GROUPED_WRITE_READER_PROFILE:-dual}; readerProfileSegment=; if [ "$readerProfile" != dual ]; then readerProfileSegment=-$readerProfile; fi; output=.artifacts/grouped-write-${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_GROUPED_WRITE_MODE:-incremental}${readerProfileSegment}-${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_ROWS:-100000}rows-${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_WRITE_BATCH_SIZE:-1}mutations${suffix:+-$suffix}.json; VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON=$output vp test bench src/grouped-write.bench.ts --run --testTimeout 0 --outputJson $output'
scripts.bench:query-delta-operations: sh -c 'deltaCase=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_DELTA_OPERATION_CASE:-head-replacement-batch}; rows=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_ROWS:-10000}; inputOps=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_DELTA_OPERATION_COUNT:-64}; emittedOps=$((inputOps * 2)); computed=.artifacts/query-delta-operations-${deltaCase}-${rows}rows-${emittedOps}ops.json; output=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON:-$computed}; VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON=$output vp test bench src/query-delta-operations.bench.ts --run --testTimeout 0 --outputJson $output'
scripts.bench:raw-active-retained-delta: sh -c 'retainedCase=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_RETAINED_CASE:-visible-delete}; rows=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_ROWS:-100000}; limit=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_RETAINED_WINDOW_LIMIT:-50}; batch=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_REPLACEMENT_BATCH_SIZE:-2}; suffix=; if { [ "$retainedCase" = match-replacement-batch ] && { [ "$limit" != 50 ] || [ "$batch" != 2 ]; }; } || { [ "$retainedCase" = noop ] && [ "$limit" != 50 ]; } || { [ "$retainedCase" = visible-delete-batch ] && { [ "$limit" != 50 ] || [ "$batch" != 2 ]; }; }; then suffix=-${limit}limit-${batch}batch; fi; computed=.artifacts/raw-active-retained-delta-${retainedCase}-${rows}rows${suffix}.json; output=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON:-$computed}; VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON=$output vp test bench src/raw-active-retained-delta.bench.ts --run --testTimeout 0 --outputJson $output'
scripts.bench:raw-active-retained-delta:match-re: sh -c 'rows=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_ROWS:-100000}; limit=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_RETAINED_WINDOW_LIMIT:-50}; batch=${VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_REPLACEMENT_BATCH_SIZE:-2}; suffix=; if [ "$limit" != 50 ] || [ "$batch" != 2 ]; then suffix=-${limit}limit-${batch}batch; fi; output=.artifacts/raw-active-retained-delta-match-replacement-batch-${rows}rows${suffix}.json; VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_RETAINED_CASE=match-replacement-batch VIEW_SERVER_ENGINE_BENCH_OUTPUT_JSON=$output vp test bench src/raw-active-retained-delta.bench.ts --run --testTimeout 0 --outputJson $output'
